name: Pukamon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Shoots bubble-like substances from its mouth.

description: Although its appearance gives the image of an aquatic dinosaur infant, this playful Digimon's clever movements are like those of a seahorse . However, the friendly personality it had as Pitchmon has totally vanished, and it quickly flees if others approach. Its outer skin cannot yet bear the water pressure and low temperature of the deep sea, so the duration it can spend submerged in deep waters is not long.
